name: fable-method
description: The Fable Way — a self-contained working-discipline plugin for capable models; each workspace grows its own git-ignored project overlay.

plugins.name: fable-method
plugins.description: Self-contained 'Fable Way' working discipline: an auto-triggering method skill (reflexes, risk tiers, plan shape, calibrated-code stance) + runner skills (scope, debug, adversarial review, verify, ship), a deterministic Stop-hook calibration gate (done-claims must carry their evidence ledger), plus per-workspace git-ignored .fable/ state (project overlay + in-flight task files + calibration record). No external plugin/skill dependencies.
